name: duck-duck-duck-codex
description: Duck Duck Duck companion hooks for Codex sessions. Requires the Duck Duck Duck app.

interface.shortDescription: Connects Codex sessions to the Duck Duck Duck app.
interface.longDescription: Adds Codex hooks for prompt scoring, response scoring, session health, and voice-assisted permission decisions through the Duck Duck Duck app.
defaultPrompt: Check whether Duck Duck Duck is connected.
Use Duck Duck Duck voice approval for commands.
Score this Codex session with Duck Duck Duck.
